full_text:
Yuan Huan (Yaoqing) 袁渙 (曜卿)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yuan Huan (袁渙), styledYaoqing (曜卿), was born in Chen. A man of courtesy, generosity and restraint, he refused to rebuke Liu Bei. Yuan Huan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, the Shu Kingdom, Yuan Shu, Lu Bu, and the Wei Kingdom. Yuan Huan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
